{/* api-page */}

<ApiLayout defaultRequestLanguage='shell' defaultResponseStatusCode='200' supportedRequestLanguageList={['shell']} supportedResponseStatusCodeList={['200']}>

<ParamsWrapper>

# Buy orders

Use this API to fill listings.

<RequestParamsWrapper>

### Request address

<RequestTag>POST</RequestTag> `https://web3.okx.com/api/v5/mktplace/nft/markets/buy`

### Request param

- **Body param**

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description**                                           |
|---------------|----------|--------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|
| chain         | String   | Yes          | Chain name refer to [Supported blockchains](../../linked-resources/marketplace-supported-blockchains.md) for details  |
| walletAddress | String   | Yes          | Address of wallet filling.                                |
| items         | object[] | Yes          | List of [item](../marketplace-models/marketplace-order-model.md#buy-item-model) to buy. |

</RequestParamsWrapper>

<ResponseParamsWrapper>

</ResponseParamsWrapper>

</ParamsWrapper>

<CodeExampleWrapper>

### Request example

<RequestCodeExampleWrapper>

  <RequestCodeExample language="shell">
  ```shell
  curl -X POST "https://web3.okx.com/api/v5/mktplace/nft/markets/buy" \
       -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
       -H 'OK-ACCESS-KEY: XXX' \
       -H 'OK-ACCESS-TIMESTAMP: XXX' \
       -H 'OK-ACCESS-PASSPHRASE: XXX' \
       -H 'OK-ACCESS-SIGN: XXX' \
       -d '{
              "chain": "bsc",
              "items": [
                  {
                      "orderId": 1440952735,
                      "takeCount": 1
                  },
                  {
                      "orderId": 1440952735,
                      "takeCount": 1
                  }
              ],
              "walletAddress": "0xb0295f8ed896413eecc1032b9f97ecc8608c55ad"
           }'
  ```
  </RequestCodeExample>
</RequestCodeExampleWrapper>

### Response example

<ResponseCodeExampleWrapper>

  <ResponseCodeExample codeStatus='200'>
    ```json
      {
        "code":0,
        "data":{
          "errors":[
          ],
          "steps":[
            {
              "action":"ApprovalCurrency",
              "items":[
                {
                  "amount":"300000000000000000",
                  "approvalAddress":"0xcce3e3f79cf9091386f84610bb06947e2fc232a3",
                  "chain":56,
                  "currency":"USDC",
                  "currencyUrl":"https://static.coinall.ltd/cdn/explorer/okexchain/exchain_usdc.png",
                  "description":"Approval ERC20 to OKX",
                  "kind":"erc20Approval",
                  "orderIds":[
                    "1156591403"
                  ],
                  "platform":{
                    "icon":"https://static.coinall.ltd/cdn/nft/2ffcd699-3e14-4ac3-b6fc-e8e5369ab2fd.png",
                    "name":"OKX",
                    "source":4
                  },
                  "status":"complete",
                  "tokenAddress":"0x8ac76a51cc950d9822d68b83fe1ad97b32cd580d"
                }
              ]
            },
            {
              "action":"TakeOrders",
              "items":[
                {
                  "chain":56,
                  "contractAddress":"0xcce3e3f79cf9091386f84610bb06947e2fc232a3",
                  "description":"Buy tokens on OKX",
                  "input":"",
                  "kind":"transaction",
                  "orderIds":[
                    "1156591403"
                  ],
                  "platform":{
                    "icon":"https://static.coinall.ltd/cdn/nft/2ffcd699-3e14-4ac3-b6fc-e8e5369ab2fd.png",
                    "name":"OKX",
                    "source":4
                  },
                  "status":"incomplete",
                  "totalPrice":"0.3",
                  "value":"0"
                }
              ]
            }
          ]
        },
        "msg":""
      }
    ```
  </ResponseCodeExample>

</ResponseCodeExampleWrapper>

</CodeExampleWrapper>

</ApiLayout>
